---
name: style-review
description: Review a draft blog post against René's established voice rules before publishing.
---

# Style Review Skill

1. Load `.github/instructions/blog-style.instructions.md`.
2. Check the draft against each rule; flag specific sentences that violate
   voice (marketing-speak, hedging filler, generic frameworks).
3. Check structural fit: does it open with a story/question? Does it end
   with a point of view, not a CTA?
4. Suggest edits inline as a diff, don't just list feedback prose.
5. Do NOT rewrite the whole post — only propose targeted line edits so
   René's actual voice isn't replaced by a generic one.
